text:
- Update RUN_DEPENDS:
  - Time::HiRes is already in all supported Perl releases
  - Explicitly define minimal required version of p5-DBD-mysql and p5-DBI
- Bump PORTREVISION for dependency change

Port maintainer (flo@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd.
